task_completion.description: Configure Custom Link Positions in Screaming Frog
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog 'Custom Link Positions' configuration window is open, showing the 4 required names ('Header', 'Footer', 'Sidebar', 'Main_Content') mapped to their respective XPaths (//header, //footer, //div[contains(@class, "side_categories")], //div[contains(@class, "col-sm-8")]).
Screaming Frog main interface shows 'https://books.toscrape.com/' in the URL bar at the top, with evidence of a completed or ongoing crawl (e.g., URLs listed in the main pane, progress bar).

A file save dialog or file manager showing the export of 'All Inlinks' (typically via Bulk Export > Links > All Inlinks) saved as 'inlinks_by_position.csv' in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the link distribution text report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano) or terminal window showing the creation or existence of the file 'link_distribution_report.txt' in the '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Text report lists counts for each custom position
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'link_distribution_report.txt' are visible and explicitly list the four custom positions ('Header', 'Footer', 'Sidebar', 'Main_Content') along with their respective numerical link counts.

integrity.description: Agent used the Screaming Frog GUI for configuration and crawling
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interaction with the actual Screaming Frog SEO Spider application interface, rather than a custom script (e.g., Python/BeautifulSoup) bypassing the software.

integrity.description: CSV was exported directly from Screaming Frog
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of using Screaming Frog's built-in export functionality (like the Bulk Export menu), rather than manually creating a CSV file in a text editor.
The numbers in the text report should look like realistic crawl data (e.g., dozens or hundreds of links), not obvious placeholders like '1, 2, 3, 4' or '0' for all categories.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/ (Returns 200 OK). Expected CSV export path: ~/Documents/SEO/exports/inlinks_by_position.csv. Expected text report path: ~/Documents/SEO/reports/link_distribution_report.txt. Required Custom Link Positions and valid XPaths: 'Header' (//header), 'Footer' (//footer), 'Sidebar' (//div[contains(@class, "side_categories")]), and 'Main_Content' (//div[contains(@class, "col-sm-8")]).
